mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 6.5%, it signals severe labor market deterioration that immediately triggers risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in over 55% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 6.5%, or the signal loses predictive power during non-recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and builder confidence, driving sustained positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint positive deviation of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns, with out-of-sample R-squared below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals strengthening manufacturing output that translates to higher corporate earnings expectations, yielding positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth rates show zero or negative correlation with 20-day forward returns during recovery phases, or the signal reverses direction when inflation exceeds 3%.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product reflects robust aggregate demand that supports corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: GDPC1 levels or growth rates fail to predict 5-day forward returns with a Rank IC above 0.01 in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid consumer price inflation exceeding a 0.4% monthly threshold forces anticipatory monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and generating negative returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive or neutral when CPIAUCSL rises above 0.4% monthly, or the threshold effect disappears after controlling for FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirms genuine labor market tightening that boosts consumer spending power and drives positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The divergent movement of PAYEMS and UNRATE shows no predictive power for 20-day returns, or the signal fails when wage growth data contradicts employment trends.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp contraction in real personal consumption expenditures signals immediate consumer distress that triggers rapid portfolio deleveraging and negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: RSAFS declines do not precede negative 5-day returns, or the mechanism fails to activate when consumer confidence indices remain stable.
